top_signals.title: Aussie Faces Headwinds as Global Bond Selloff Narrows Yield Edge
top_signals.summary: The Australian dollar is coming under renewed pressure as the yield advantage it holds over US assets wanes and investors brace for a possible escalation to hostilities in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
